channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Someone is flying a drone in Clissold Park kids playground, 28th June
item.description:
There's a guy flying a drone likely to have a camera in the kids playground in Clissold Park.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The van has been there for a few weeks without moving. I believe it has been abandoned, 28th June
item.description:
Abandoned van

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meadway, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In Glenilla Road outside 37 Glenloch Road, corner property. Opposite 30 Glenilla Road., 28th June
item.description:
The tree branches are starting to cause a problem, blocking the pavement and touching 37 Glenloch Road windows and gutters. This has frequently caused problems in the past with blocked gutters.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Glenilla Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of bikes blocking the pavement, 28th June
item.description:
In the last few weeks, the section of City Road outside the garage and the side streets surrounding seem to have become Voi bike parks. They are regularly sprawled all over the pavements. Today, there was hardly room to walk past the garage on the pavement. A wheelchair user would’ve had to divert into the garage on onto the road to get through.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 257, City Road, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Misuse of drugs in a public space near children's play area on daily basis. Members of public are unable to use the park and play area due to high levels of drug users., 28th June
item.description:
Misuse of drugs in a public park daily basis no enforcement or governing authority.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lee Conservancy Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White car parked on pavement illegally, 28th June
item.description:
This white car has been parked on the pavement on Lawrie Park Avenue since 16.30 on Sunday 28th June

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lawrie Park Avenue, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: What is the local authority doing about the misuse of drugs in public parks on on a daily basis. White male was seen smoking very strong drugs in park why children and families are around. No enforcement, no policing., 28th June
item.description:
Misuse of class B drugs in public park millfields on a daily basis local authority not governing or patrolling allowing this to happen. Families cannot use park due to high levels of drug users using the park themselves to smoke illegal drugs.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite 1 Dunmore, 28th June
item.description:
Rubbish dumped - it is happening every week at the moment. Thank you for continuing to collect

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunmore Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Bags of rubbish and paper boxes, 28th June
item.description:
These bags of rubbish paper boxes have been there for some time.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bentham Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Redundant signage and barriers blocking public walkway and road, 28th June
item.description:
Redundant signage and barriers blocking public walkway and road. These signs were from an event which has finished and need to be cleared.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crown Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in public park, 28th June
item.description:
On entering The Glades Park Sidcup at the main entrance as you walk along the park there is a dead fox in a cardboard box placed next to the bin. Lots of flies around it. Noticed 28th June approx 3pm.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Burnt Oak Lane, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tyre left on footway, 28th June
item.description:
Tyre fly tipped on footway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 174, Fortis Green Road, Muswell Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Growth around the base of the tree is blocking view of traffic., 28th June
item.description:
Excessive growth around the bottom of the tree is blocking the view of traffic coming from the right when exiting Chaucer Road onto Hurst Road. The same is true of the tree to the other side of Chaucer Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 216, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned motorbike in the woods, 28th June
item.description:
Abandoned motorbike in the woods

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochester Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flying outside Tower Mews, 28th June
item.description:
There is a collection of rubbish outside Tower Mews that is not from the residents of Tower Mews, we have large bins for rubbish & recycling and all use them regularly.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tower Mews, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recycling bins in Chislehurst Car Park overflowing and flytipped, 28th June
item.description:
See photos Overflowing bins and Flytipped recycling Bins need emptying more regularly and overflow removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Adelaide Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned road safety signs, 28th June
item.description:
From works done on railway bridge several weeks ago - the road safety signs were left behind and have been lying at the side of the road since then

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Milk Street, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Growth round base, obscuring vision, 28th June
item.description:
Excessive growth round base obscures vision of oncoming traffic at adjacent crossing point and when exiting driveway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 216, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken inspection hatch on pavement, 28th June
item.description:
A heavy vehicle has driven over a probably BT metal inspection/maintenance cover in the middle of the pavement. It's a risk of collapsing if anyone stands on it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Chestnut Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging brambles, 28th June
item.description:
Overhanging brambles dangerous body level on high traffic pavement

Report on FixMyStreet
